CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'hello world'), (3, 'Goodbye World');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE 'hello world';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE 'Hello%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE '%World';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE '%o%';
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE 'hElLo%';
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table2 VALUES (1, 'This is a test'), (2, 'another Test'), (3, 'final TRY');
SELECT t1.id FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.name ILIKE t2.description;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE '%World') AS subquery WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE name ILIKE '%l%';
CREATE TABLE test_table3 (id Int32, label String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table3 VALUES (1, 'alpha'), (2, 'Beta'), (3, 'GAMMA');
SELECT * FROM test_table3 WHERE label ILIKE 'ba%';
SELECT t1.id, t2.id FROM test_table t1 CROSS JOIN test_table3 t2 WHERE t1.name ILIKE '%' || t2.label || '%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table2 WHERE description ILIKE 'final%');
CREATE TABLE test_table4 (id Int32, mixed_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table4 VALUES (1, '123'), (2, 'Hello123'), (3, 'hElLo456');
SELECT * FROM test_table4 WHERE mixed_value ILIKE 'hello%';
SELECT * FROM test_table4 WHERE mixed_value ILIKE '12%';
SELECT * FROM test_table4 WHERE mixed_value ILIKE '%456';
